reviews.comment:
COPIA DE TARJETA - !!!!!! . El día de ayer domingo 2/10 por la tarde cargamos nafta con una tarjeta que no utilizábamos hace tiempo.
Nos la ha copiado .
Deberían ver más cámaras para ver cómo realizó a copia , la cual desembocó en horas más tarde y el día de hoy en 5 compras .
Por supuesto que corresponde la denuncia , la cual ya está realizada en la comisaría . Pero no queríamos dejar de decirlo por este medio.
Un papelón. La gente no quiere trabajar

(Translated by Google)
CARD COPYING - !!!!!! Yesterday afternoon, Sunday, October 2nd, we filled up with gas using a card we hadn't used in a while.
It was copied.
They should check more security cameras to see how the copy was made, which resulted in 5 purchases later today.
Of course, a report should be filed, which has already been filed at the police station. But we didn't want to miss the opportunity to report it here.
A disgrace. People don't want to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlOUt1M1dBEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención de las/los playeros excelente.
Personas despiertas, proactivas. Buen precio del combustible y atención veloz.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants was excellent.
They were alert and proactive. Fuel prices were good, and the service was fast.
